name: Jackrabbit Technologies Dance & Gymnastics Studio API
what_it_does: Jackrabbit Technologies REST API for dance studio, gymnastics, and youth activity class management software. Enables AI agents to manage student enrollment and class registrations, handle tuition billing and payment processing, access class schedules and instructor assignments, manage family and student accounts, retrieve attendance and skills tracking data, handle waitlist management, integrate with email marketing for parent communications, and connect studio data with accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing student enrollment and class registration from studio management agents
Automating tuition billing and payment reminders from billing agents
Accessing class schedules and studio capacity from operations agents
Integrating parent communication data with email marketing from engagement agents
not_for: Fitness club management without youth class and enrollment focus
K-12 schools without extracurricular studio class management
Large gym chains without boutique studio enrollment workflows
best_when: A dance studio, gymnastics facility, martial arts school, or music school using Jackrabbit wants AI agents to automate enrollment, billing, scheduling, and parent communication workflows.
avoid_when: COPPA: Student data for children under 13 requires COPPA compliance. Parental consent required for data sharing. Minor student data has heightened privacy requirements. Payment data for minor accounts requires parental authorization.

auth.notes: Jackrabbit uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. No granular scope control. API primarily used for third-party integrations via partner program. Limited public documentation.

pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly pricing based on active students; flat rates by student count tiers
pricing.notes: Charlotte, North Carolina. Founded 2004. Market leader for dance studio and gymnastics management software. 10,000+ studios using platform. Also used by martial arts schools, music schools, and swim schools. Focus on youth activity enrollment management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: COPPA: Minor student data requires parental consent and COPPA compliance
No public MCP server — API key only with limited public documentation
No webhooks — polling required for enrollment and billing updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access including minor student data
Youth activity context — parental authorization required for payment and communication automation
Skills tracking data is tied to individual student records under COPPA
agent_readiness.security_notes: Minor student and family data. COPPA, PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key only. US data residency. Children's data protections mandatory. Parental consent required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Minor student data. COPPA, PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key only. US data residency. COPPA compliance mandatory.
